signals.headline: South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Inflation Rises to 2.2-2.16% YoY | YES | MED confidence**

South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, per Trading Economics data released around early April; an alternative source reports 2.16%[3][2]. This uptick, below market forecasts of 2.4% but above recent lows, aligns with Bank of Korea's revised 2026 outlook
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
